entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An important legume crop grown in the dry savannas of Nigeria

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: The country where the groundnut improvement research and farming systems are located

entities.name: DRY SAVANNAS
entities.description: The specific ecological region in Nigeria where groundnut is primarily planted

entities.name: FUNGAL DISEASES
entities.description: One of the major biological setbacks affecting groundnut production in Nigeria

entities.name: BACTERIA DISEASES
entities.description: One of the major biological setbacks affecting groundnut production in Nigeria

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: A chemical contamination issue that serves as a setback for groundnut production

entities.name: WEAK SEED SYSTEM
entities.description: A systemic failure in seed distribution and quality affecting groundnut production

entities.name: CROP MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems developed to overcome production setbacks and improve groundnut yield

entities.name: ROSETTE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut varieties to resist the Rosette disease

entities.name: RMP12
entities.description: A late maturing, rosette resistant groundnut variety also known as SAMNUT10

entities.name: RMP91
entities.description: A late maturing, rosette resistant groundnut variety also known as SAMNUT11

entities.name: LATE MATURING
entities.description: A growth characteristic where the crop takes longer to reach maturity

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental shift resulting in shortened growing seasons

entities.name: SHORTENED GROWING SEASON
entities.description: A reduced period for crop growth caused by climate change

entities.name: EARLY MATURING
entities.description: A growth characteristic where the crop reaches maturity quickly, necessary for shortened seasons

entities.name: DISEASE TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop variety to withstand or resist diseases

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop variety to maintain productivity under water-limited conditions

entities.name: SAMNUT21
entities.description: A medium duration groundnut variety also known as UGA2

entities.name: SAMNUT22
entities.description: A medium duration groundnut variety also known as M 572 or 80I

entities.name: SAMNUT23
entities.description: An early-maturing groundnut variety also known as ICGV-IS 96894

entities.name: TROPICAL LEGUME PROJECT
entities.description: A research and development project that led to the release of several improved groundnut varieties

entities.name: SAMNUT-24
entities.description: An improved groundnut variety released through the Tropical Legume Project

entities.name: SAMNUT-25
entities.description: An improved groundnut variety released through the Tropical Legume Project

entities.name: SAMNUT-26
entities.description: An improved groundnut variety released through the Tropical Legume Project

entities.name: DRY SEASON
entities.description: The period of the year with low rainfall where groundnut cultivation was increased

entities.name: USAID-GROUNDNUT UP-SCALING PROJECT
entities.description: A project partnered with the Tropical Legume Project to build farmer capacity and seed availability

entities.name: PRODUCTION TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Improved techniques for groundnut production promoted to farmers
